title: JavaScript Fundamentals: Zero to Job-Ready
description: A complete beginner-to-intermediate JavaScript course covering variables, functions, DOM manipulation, async programming, and modern ES2024+ syntax — with hands-on text-based lessons.
shortDescription: Master core JavaScript from scratch with practical, text-based lessons.

lessons.title: What is JavaScript and Why It Matters
lessons.content:
JavaScript is the programming language of the web...

In this lesson we cover what JS is, where it runs, and why every web developer needs it.

lessons.title: Variables: let, const, and var
lessons.content: Learn the difference between let, const, and var, and when to use each one...

lessons.title: Writing Your First Functions
lessons.content: Functions are reusable blocks of code...

lessons.title: If/Else and Switch Statements
lessons.content: Control the flow of your program with conditionals...

title: Advanced JavaScript: Async Patterns & Performance
description: Deep dive into Promises, async/await, event loop internals, debouncing, throttling, and performance optimization techniques for production JS applications.
shortDescription: Master async JavaScript and performance patterns used in production apps.

lessons.title: Understanding the JavaScript Event Loop
lessons.content: The event loop is what allows JavaScript to be non-blocking...

lessons.title: Promises Explained
lessons.content: A Promise represents a value that may be available now, later, or never...

lessons.title: async/await in Practice
lessons.content: async/await is syntactic sugar over Promises that makes async code read like sync code...

title: Python for Beginners: Complete Guide
description: Learn Python from scratch — syntax, data types, loops, functions, and file handling — through clear, text-based lessons designed for absolute beginners.
shortDescription: Start coding in Python with zero prior experience required.

lessons.title: Installing Python and Writing Your First Script
lessons.content: In this lesson, you'll install Python and run your first 'Hello World' program...

lessons.title: Data Types: Strings, Numbers, Booleans
lessons.content: Python has several built-in data types you'll use constantly...

lessons.title: For and While Loops
lessons.content: Loops let you repeat code without writing it multiple times...

title: Python Data Structures & Algorithms
description: A practical course on lists, dictionaries, sets, stacks, queues, sorting, and searching algorithms — implemented step-by-step in Python.
shortDescription: Learn DSA fundamentals through clear Python implementations.

lessons.title: Lists and List Comprehensions
lessons.content: Lists are Python's most versatile data structure...

lessons.title: Dictionaries and Hash Maps
lessons.content: Dictionaries provide O(1) average lookup time...

lessons.title: Bubble Sort, Merge Sort, Quick Sort
lessons.content: We compare three sorting algorithms and their time complexity...

title: Python Automation & Scripting for Business
description: Automate repetitive tasks with Python — file handling, web scraping basics, email automation, and scheduling scripts to save hours of manual work.
shortDescription: Use Python to automate boring, repetitive business tasks.

lessons.title: Reading and Writing Files with Python
lessons.content: Automate file organization, renaming, and batch processing...

title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
description: Understand the core concepts behind AI — machine learning, neural networks, and generative AI — explained in plain language with no math background required.
shortDescription: A beginner-friendly introduction to how AI actually works.

lessons.title: AI vs Machine Learning vs Deep Learning
lessons.content: These three terms are often used interchangeably but mean different things...

lessons.title: A Brief History of AI
lessons.content: From the Turing Test to ChatGPT — how AI evolved over 70 years...

title: Prompt Engineering Mastery
description: Learn how to write effective prompts for large language models like Claude and GPT — covering few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, and system prompt design.
shortDescription: Get better, more reliable outputs from any AI model.

lessons.title: Anatomy of a Good Prompt
lessons.content: A good prompt has context, a clear task, and constraints...

lessons.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting
lessons.content: Asking a model to 'think step by step' can dramatically improve accuracy...

title: Machine Learning with Python
description: A hands-on introduction to supervised and unsupervised learning using Python — covering regression, classification, and clustering with real-world examples.
shortDescription: Build your first machine learning models with Python.

lessons.title: Linear Regression from Scratch
lessons.content: Linear regression predicts a continuous value based on input features...

lessons.title: Classification with Logistic Regression
lessons.content: Classification predicts a category instead of a number...

title: AI Automation Tools for Small Businesses
description: A practical, non-technical course on using AI tools (n8n, Zapier, ChatGPT, Claude) to automate marketing, customer support, and operations for small businesses.
shortDescription: Use no-code AI tools to automate your business operations.

lessons.title: Which Tasks Should You Automate First?
lessons.content: Not everything should be automated — here's how to prioritize...

title: Generative AI for Content Creators
description: Learn to use AI image, video, and text generation tools to produce content faster — covering ethical use, brand voice, and monetization strategies.
shortDescription: Speed up your content creation workflow using generative AI.

lessons.title: The Generative AI Content Stack
lessons.content: From scripting to thumbnails to voiceovers — where AI fits in your pipeline...
